weakPoints.description: Shopify-to-Xero sync relies on a third-party app
weakPoints.recommendation: Set up monitoring alerts for sync failures

overallAssessment: Your integration landscape is moderately connected. The main risk is the third-party dependency for accounting sync.
recommendations: Consider a direct API integration for Shopify-to-Xero if volume grows
Add webhook monitoring for payment events
nextStepSuggestion: Set up the weak connections more reliably.
nextStepDescription: Use Integration Setup to strengthen the Shopify-to-Xero connection.
